meta.strategy: Hold the up-trend basket overnight, rebalancing at the close, since 2005-10-19. P/L is AFTER ~43.2% short-term tax (single filer ~$350k, Colorado, 2026) and 10 bps slippage per dollar traded; pre-tax $73,691, ~$15,028 tax. Benchmark SPY never sold (untaxed).
meta.hindsight_note: The stock universe was hand-picked recently, with full knowledge of which names won over the backtest years — and delisted losers can't even appear in the data. The dashed control line runs the SAME rule on the 9 S&P sector ETFs (a fixed list nobody cherry-picked): the gap between the lines is roughly what hindsight stock-picking added.
